core.label: ALGOL Fundamentals
core.description: The ancestor of most modern languages.

topics.label: Historical Significance
topics.description: ALGOL 60 introduced block structure, lexical scoping, and BNF notation.

topics.label: Syntax & Structure
topics.description: begin/end blocks, if/then/else, for loops. ALGOL's syntax influenced C, Pascal, and Java.

topics.label: Procedures & Recursion
topics.description: Procedures with pass-by-name and pass-by-value. Full recursion support.
